mapper.select: SELECT id, account_name, balance, currency FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = 'USD' AND account_type = 'DEMAND' AND is_dormant = FALSE AND closed_at IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE card_transactions SET is_roundup_collected = TRUE, roundup_collected_at = NOW(), roundup_amount = CEIL(amount / 1000) * 1000 - amount WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_roundup_collected = FALSE AND id IN
#{id}
